statement.en: Exploring low-carbon energy transitions in the non-road engine sector
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission provides no substantive content for evaluation. The abstract is withheld pending embargo expiration, making the provisional axiom (core claim, methodology, or theoretical contribution) observation-impossible and context-dependent. No truth-value can be assigned to an empty or inaccessible proposition.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 燃料の衰退と新エネルギーの台頭が、時間という深い川を静かに横切る。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 古い根が次第に浅くなり、新しい枝が上昇の光へ向かって伸びていく。
